message:
fix(security): bounded pushes in trust_zone and staking_governance

- trust_zone: bind_key_to_zone now deduplicates zone entries and uses
  push_bounded (matching allow_cross_zone pattern), prevents unbounded
  Vec growth from repeated bindings
- staking_governance: slash_events and used_evidence_hashes inner Vecs
  now use push_bounded with MAX_SLASH_EVENTS_PER_STAKE (256) and
  MAX_EVIDENCE_HASHES_PER_STAKE (256) caps
- Added regression test for bind_key_to_zone dedup behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
